role_title: Growth Merchant Lead - Emerging Markets Boston

location.office_time_required: 70%+ of time in the field traveling; some time working remotely

level_signals: 4+ years of in-person, outside B2B sales experience required
Expected to operate autonomously and create playbooks

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 4+ years of in-person, outside B2B sales experience (field experience is required)
must_haves.qualifier: in-person, outside B2B; field experience required

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have proven success running short, high-velocity, full sales cycles – including same-day closes.
You have strong prospecting, hunting, and negotiation skills.
You are energized by extensive travel – spending 70%+ of your time in the field, including overnight travel inside and outside of your home state.
You have demonstrated success operating autonomously and thrive in environments where you will create the playbook, not follow one.
You are comfortable using Salesforce, Google Workspace, and sales productivity tools.
You will need to live by or in proximity to a major airport.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You are entrepreneurial, adaptable, and motivated building and scaling new markets.

scope.surface: Emerging Markets (T4–T5 geographies) restaurant and retailer partnerships
scope.business_model: marketplace / platform, B2B field sales to SMB restaurants and retailers, revenue-share agreements
primary_metrics_inferred: Market expansion velocity (deal close rate, same-day closes)
core_responsibilities: Expand DoorDash's presence by traveling to emerging markets and developing new restaurant partnerships.
Lead end-to-end, in-person sales cycles– prospecting, pitching, negotiating, and closing.
Sell business owners on DoorDash's value and secure revenue-share agreements.
Consistently execute high-volume field activity and close deals within days.
Build scalable approaches and playbooks to accelerate market expansion.
Shape DoorDash's expansion strategy in rural economies.

green_flags: Full compensation range disclosed including base ($93,840–$138,000) and OTE ($156,400–$230,000)
High-priority company initiative — T4-T5 markets described as over 40% of remaining restaurant opportunities
Applications accepted on an ongoing basis
Clear ownership and high autonomy — create the playbook, not follow one
Comprehensive benefits package including 401(k) matching, 16 weeks parental leave, wellness benefits
red_flags: 70%+ travel requirement with overnight travel inside and outside home state — highly demanding lifestyle
Must live near a major airport — geographic constraint on candidate pool
Role is essentially a pure hunter/field sales role with limited mention of career advancement specifics

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years required, comp range, and autonomy signals)
scope.business_model (inferred from JD description of revenue-share agreements and marketplace platform)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated)
location.type (classified as hybrid given 70%+ travel in field + some remote work; not a traditional hybrid office arrangement)
ambiguities: The role title mentions 'Boston' but the JD body does not specify a fixed office location — the role is field-based with travel; Boston appears to be the home base region rather than an office requirement.

nice_to_haves are sparse; 'entrepreneurial, adaptable, and motivated building and scaling new markets' appears in the must-have context ('We're excited about you because') but overlaps culturally with the autonomous playbook-creation requirement — flagged as soft given it is a characterization rather than a verifiable skill.
Location type is ambiguous: role is described as 'field sales' with 'some time working remotely' — not a traditional hybrid but classified as hybrid given the mix of field and remote work.
